form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning by 1.3 len Chantilly All Weather January 10 over 1600m defeating Hello Jo carrying 58kg at $5.10. On debut third of 11 at Chantilly All Weather December 11 over 1600m, 3 len behind Etchebaster carrying 58kg at $9. Has ability and is among the chances.

On debut third of 11 at Chantilly All Weather December 11 over 1600m, 3 len behind Etchebaster carrying 58kg at $9. Has ability and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run favourite; won by 2.5 len at Lyon-la-Soie March 21 over 1800m defeating Charlie Oscar carrying 58kg at $1.80. The race before that 2nd of 8 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 2 over 1800m, nose behind Sahimaa carrying 58kg at $2.50. Can improve further and is worth following up.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 3rd in a small field at Chantilly All Weather on March 12 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Synaran carrying 57kg at $3.50. Previously second-up 2nd of 8 at Saint-Cloud on September 2 over 1600m, slow going 1.5 len behind Elastic with 58kg at $10. Facing a tough assignment.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months second last of 7 at Saint-Cloud in LR on March 15 over 1600m, on rain affected going; 14 len behind Elastic with 58kg at $28. Previously second-up won by 0.8 len at Cholet June 30 over 1350m defeating Tissimo carrying 58.5kg at $2.30. Fitter but others are better placed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Second-up. Previously second-up won by 0.8 len at Cholet June 30 over 1350m defeating Tissimo carrying 58.5kg at $2.30. Fitter but others are better placed.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when favourite; won by 4 len at Saint-Cloud November 9 over 1500m on a heavy track defeating Damn Precious carrying 58kg at $1.70. Shows good ability and can make it two on end.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; won by 1.3 len at Chantilly All Weather March 16 over 1600m defeating Vegamix carrying 58kg at $3.70. Better for that run and can go on with it.
